title: Electrical Estimator / Electrical Engineer
description:
Job Title: Electrical Estimator / Electrical Engineer 



Company Overview:

We are a Los Angeles based electrical distributor and wholesaler established in 2004, supplying contractors and developers with electrical materials for residential, commercial, and industrial projects. We are an authorized distributor for major brands including Siemens and other leading manufacturers, providing a full range of electrical solutions.



This is a long-term opportunity with consistent and ongoing work. We are not looking for occasional support. We need someone reliable who can handle a steady volume of projects and grow with our team.



Position Overview:

We are seeking an experienced Electrical Estimator / Electrical Engineer who can review electrical drawings and provide accurate material takeoffs and cost estimates. This role also requires strong technical knowledge and the ability to support both internal staff and clients.



Key Responsibilities:



Review electrical plans and drawings and prepare detailed estimates

Perform material takeoffs for:

• Switchboards

• Metering Panels

• Lighting Systems

Ensure all materials meet project specifications and requirements

Analyze electrical systems and provide accurate, code-compliant solutions

Provide technical support to internal staff

Assist with client questions and communicate technical details clearly

Work closely with the team to ensure fast and accurate turnaround on quotes



Mandatory Requirements:



Must be able to work 5 hours per day, 5 days per week (starting schedule)

Must be able to fully accommodate PST (Los Angeles) business hours and remain responsive during this time

Strong understanding of U.S. electrical standards and codes

Strong knowledge of power distribution fundamentals, including:

• Three-phase systems

• Voltage regulation

• Protection schemes

• Electrical system analysis

Experience in industrial, commercial, and construction projects

In-depth knowledge of:

• Transformers

• Switchgear

• Circuit breakers

• Protective devices

Ability to read and interpret electrical drawings accurately

Ability to ensure all designs and materials meet U.S. project requirements and compliance standards



Communication Requirements:



Must be able to speak and write clear English

Must be able to communicate effectively with U.S.-based staff and clients



Compensation:



Starting: $430/month based on 25 hours per week (5 hours per day, 5 days per week)

Schedule must align with PST (Los Angeles) business hours

After performance review: $690–$700/month based on full-time (40 hours per week, 5 days per week)



Important Notes:



This is a long-term role with consistent daily work

Candidate must be reliable, detail-oriented, and able to handle multiple projects

Opportunity to transition into a full-time role based on performance



Experience working with U.S. contractors, developers, or distributors preferred

Familiarity with quoting materials for U.S.-based projects is a must

title: Remote Sales Closer (Cold Calling – US Clients)
description:
We’re currently hiring a Sales Closer to join our remote team.



This role is ideal for someone who is confident on calls, communicates clearly, and is comfortable with cold calling business owners while keeping conversations natural and professional.



We take a value-first approach—no aggressive or pushy selling.



What You’ll Be Doing

Make outbound cold calls to business owners in the US

Start and manage conversations confidently from the first few seconds

Present the offer in a clear, simple way

Handle objections calmly and professionally

Close deals and pass clients to our internal team

What Makes This Role Different

We are not pushy or overly sales-focused

Conversations are natural and consultative

The offer is easy to explain and resonates well with business owners

Many team members consistently close 2–5 deals per week



You’re not expected to pressure people—just guide the conversation effectively.



Compensation

200$ Base pay

$100 per closed deal(Can close 2 deals a week easily)

$50 weekly bonus (3+ deals/week)

No cap on earnings



What We’re Looking For

Strong and clear English communication

Comfortable with cold calling and handling rejection

Able to sound natural, not scripted

Confident in leading conversations toward a decision

Self-motivated and consistent

Performance Expectations

Minimum 2 closed deals per week

Work Setup

Fully remote

Flexible hours

No micromanagement



How to Apply (Important)



To be considered:



Short introduction (3–5 lines)

Any relevant experience (especially cold calling, if any)

A 60-second voice recording introducing yourself.



Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.



Kindly Fill Up This Form To Be Considered.







We’re hiring quickly.

If you’re comfortable picking up the phone, starting conversations, and closing naturally—you’ll do well here.



Wishing you all the best.

title: Instagram Carousel Designer — Wedding Photography Studio
description:
Instagram Carousel Designer — Wedding Photography Studio



We're a wedding photography and videography studio based in Vancouver, BC looking for a detail-oriented carousel designer to help us create Instagram carousels from our wedding galleries.



What the job looks like



You'll be given access to a wedding gallery and a template, and your job is to go through the photos, select the best ones, and assemble them into 3–5 carousels with about 15-20 images per carousel per wedding. We have roughly 30 weddings to work through, so there's plenty of consistent work. Expect 2–3 carousels per week, which works out to around 2–10 hours of work weekly.



This is not a job where you download a bunch of photos and throw them together. We care deeply about how our work is presented. The right person will have a genuine eye for which photos pair well together — in terms of color, contrast, negative space, framing, and visual flow — and will know how to sequence them so each carousel tells a complete story from slide to slide.



What we're looking for



Experience creating Instagram carousels, ideally in the wedding or photography space

Strong eye for photo selection, sequencing, and visual storytelling

Comfortable working in Canva or SCRL

Detail-oriented when it comes to exporting and organizing files in Google Drive

Able to work independently with minimal supervision

Submits completed work each week



How it works



We'll start with a paid working interview — we'll walk you through our expectations, provide a template, and have you complete one test carousel so we can see how you work.

Pay is $30 CAD per wedding (3–5 carousels), which works out to roughly $50–$100 CAD per week depending on volume.

Work is fully async. You set your own schedule as long as work is submitted weekly.



To apply



Take a look at our Instagram before 

If our aesthetic feels like something you can match or elevate, we'd love to hear from you. Send us a short intro and any examples of carousel or social media work you've done.



If you do not have wedding-related experience or similar relevant experience, please do not apply. This is not a position for someone who is just learning - we are looking for someone who can make an immediate impact right away 



Also, Only apply through
 by
ing me directly at: 

If you apply via instagram, you will likely be ignored. Please make the
 subject line:  ICD- YOUR NAME, followed by a description about the weather in your city and information about your experience and links to relevant work 



We look forward to partnering with you and joining our exciting team!

title: Virtual Receptionist – Remote
description:
Virtual Receptionist – Boutique Hotels in Panama

Remote · Salaried · Long-Term · Freelance / Independent Contractor



Join a professional hospitality team managing 6 boutique hotels in Boquete, Panama — one of Central America's most beautiful mountain destinations. We're looking for warm, organized people who genuinely enjoy taking care of guests, and who can commit to a real long-term role, not a side gig.

Before you apply, please make sure you can check all four boxes:



-  Fluent English, written and spoken (C1 / IELTS 7+)

-  20+ Mbps stable internet, quiet workspace, laptop + headset

-  Comfortable with rotating shifts including weekends, holidays, and eventual night coverage

-  Available for PH nighttime training hours (9 PM – 5:30 AM PH) for the first 2–3 weeks



If all four are a yes, we'd love to hear from you. Keep reading.



About Us

Villa Alejandro is a professional hospitality management company operating 6 boutique hotels in Boquete, Panama. We manage 60+ units with a trained remote team, structured systems, and thorough onboarding. We are not a single Airbnb host. We are a professional hotel brand.

Learn more: 
/en/



The Role

You'll be the first point of contact for international guests — handling inquiries, reservations, check-in coordination, and concierge support through WhatsApp,
, and OTA platforms (
, Airbnb, etc.). This is not a generic VA role. This is hospitality.



Schedule — PLEASE READ CAREFULLY

Rotating shifts, 5 days/week (40 paid hours), including weekends and holidays. Each shift is 8 paid hours + 30 min unpaid break.

ShiftPanama Time (UTC-5)Philippine Time (UTC+8)Morning8:00 AM – 4:30 PM9:00 PM – 5:30 AMAfternoon3:00 PM – 11:30 PM4:00 AM – 12:30 PMNight (launching soon)Overnight coverage, ~8 hrsPhilippine daytime



You must be flexible for all shifts, including the night shift once it launches

Optional 6th day with proportional extra pay

Shifts rotate fairly across the team



Onboarding — IMPORTANT

First 2–3 weeks: paid live training by our on-site receptionist in Boquete during Panama daytime hours. This means Philippine nighttime hours (approx. 9 PM – 5:30 AM PH). After training, you move to the regular rotation. Full support until you're ready to go solo.

Compensation

This is a long-term salaried position — not hourly, not gig work.



$700/month starting (40 hrs/week)

Performance and salary review at 3 months

Top performers reach $850+/month within 6 months

Optional 6th day with proportional extra pay

Paid weekly or bi-weekly via PayPal or bank transfer — no fees



What You'll Do

- Guest communication via WhatsApp (incl. voice notes),
, and OTAs

- Reservation handling, updates, cancellations, special requests

- Check-in instructions and arrival guidance

- Concierge: tours, restaurants, transport, spa in Boquete

- Organized shift notes and handovers

- Tools: Google Workspace, WhatsApp Business, OTA dashboards



What We're Looking For

- C1-level English or equivalent (IELTS 7+, native-like written fluency)

- Hospitality mindset — "guest experience," not just "customer service"

- Highly organized — creates clean documentation without being asked

- Works independently and takes ownership

- Quiet workspace, stable 20+ Mbps internet, laptop/desktop, headset

- Comfortable with Google Sheets, calendars, messaging apps

- Fully flexible for all rotating shifts incl. weekends and holidays



Strongly Preferred

Previous professional experience in one of the following is the fastest path into this role:

- Hotels — front desk, reservations, guest services, concierge

- Short-term rental / Airbnb property management companies

- Travel and tourism — travel agencies, tour operators

- Airlines — reservations, ticketing, ground staff

- Customer service for hospitality accounts — BPO/call center work where your account was a hotel chain, 
, Expedia, Agoda, or an airline



If you don't have this background but believe you'd be a great fit, we still want to hear from you. In your application, tell us clearly why you think you'd excel at guest-facing hospitality work — what transferable skills you bring, and why hospitality is the direction you want to grow. The best members of our current team came in without hotel experience. What they had was a clear story about why they'd be great at it.



Nice to Have

- Experience with Cloudbeds, Hostaway, Guesty, Sabre, Amadeus, or any hotel PMS

- 
 / Airbnb / OTA extranet experience

- Spanish (any level) — Villa Alejandro is in Panama and many guests speak Spanish. Even basic conversational Spanish is a real plus.



Why Join Villa Alejandro?

- 2–3 week paid onboarding — we invest in you

- Long-term salaried role with a growing professional hotel brand

- Small, high-quality team focused on reliability and guest satisfaction

- Clear systems and ongoing support

- Growth as we expand to new properties

- Salary increases based on performance



How to Apply

Send to: 

Subject line: VR Application – [Your Full Name]



Your updated CV

Answer this scenario in 2–3 sentences:



- A guest at 11 PM says the AC in their room isn't working. They're upset and demand either a full refund or to be moved to another room tonight. The property is fully booked. Maintenance can't arrive until 8 AM. What do you do?



- Confirm you're OK with PH nighttime training hours during the first 2–3 weeks.

If you don't have hospitality, travel, or OTA/hotel BPO experience, add 2–3 sentences telling us why you'd still be a great fit for this role.



Shortlisted candidates will be contacted directly. Serious applicants only.

Looking forward to your application!

title: Ai Video Creator
description:

). We use AI-generated visuals to create engaging, high-quality videos — and we need someone talented to join our team.

You'll be working directly with the founder to produce AI-generated B-roll and talking-head style videos using tools like Google Veo (Flow). The content focuses on natural remedies, wellness tips, and health education — think grandma's secret remedies meets modern storytelling.

This is an ongoing, long-term role for the right person.



What You'll Be Doing:



Creating AI-generated videos using Veo (Google Flow) based on provided scripts and creative direction

Producing realistic talking-head animations with expressive characters, lip-sync, and natural gestures

Matching specific visual styles, moods, and energy levels across content pieces

Crafting and refining prompts to get the best possible output from AI video tools

Working efficiently with free credits — being resourceful and strategic with generations

Collaborating on creative direction and suggesting improvements





Who You Are:



You have hands-on experience with AI video generation tools (Veo, Runway, Pika, Kling, or similar)

You have a sharp eye for detail — you notice when something looks "off"

You understand what makes short-form video content feel authentic and engaging

You're resourceful, self-driven, and can work independently

You communicate clearly and take feedback well

Bonus: experience with health/wellness content or social media marketing





Job Details:



Type: Part-time to start, potential full-time for the right fit

Schedule: Flexible — we care about output, not hours

Compensation: Competitive, discussed with successful candidates

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)





How to Apply:



Send your application with a short intro about yourself

Share 1–3 examples of AI-generated videos you've made (Google Drive links, portfolio, or screen recordings)

Tell me which AI video tools you've used and which you're most comfortable with





If you don't have a portfolio yet but are confident in your skills, just tell me about your experience with AI tools and what you can bring to the table.

Looking forward to hearing from you

title: Ai UGC Video creator
description:
We're building a health & wellness content brand that's 100% powered by AI-generated UGC-style videos — talking-head content, B-roll, product showcases — all made with AI, no real creators on camera.

If you already know what it means to generate a realistic AI person, animate them with natural lip-sync, hand gestures, and real emotion using tools like Veo, Kling, Runway, Pika, or HeyGen — keep reading. This role is for you.

You'll work directly with the founder producing short-form vertical videos (TikTok, Reels,
) in the health/wellness/natural remedies niche. Think: scroll-stopping hooks, expressive AI characters, and cinematic B-roll — all generated, not filmed.

This is a long-term, ongoing role with consistent work for the right person.



What You'll Be Doing:



Generating realistic AI talking-head UGC videos from scripts (lip-sync, gestures, facial expressions)

Creating AI B-roll sequences that match specific moods, styles, and visual direction

Building and maintaining consistent AI characters/personas across multiple videos

Writing and refining prompts to get the highest quality output from AI video tools

Working smart with credits — maximizing quality while being efficient with generations

Keeping up with the latest AI video tools, updates, and techniques





You're a Perfect Fit If:



You've already made AI UGC-style videos — not just played with the tools, but actually produced content

You know the difference between a stiff AI generation and one that actually looks natural and alive

You've used Veo (Google Flow), Kling, Runway, Pika, HeyGen, D-ID, or similar tools

You understand short-form content — hooks, pacing, energy, what makes people stop scrolling

You're obsessed with detail — bad lip-sync, weird hands, uncanny valley stuff bothers you

You can work independently, take creative direction, and deliver without hand-holding

Bonus: you've created AI content in the health, wellness, or beauty niche





Job Details:



Type: full-time 

Schedule: Flexible hours — output matters, not when you work

Compensation: Competitive, based on experience — discussed with qualified candidates and toolsprovided

Location: Remote (Philippines-based preferred)





How to Apply:

I want to see your work, not just your words.



Short intro — who you are, your experience with AI video tools

Show me 1–3 AI-generated UGC videos you've made — Google Drive links, portfolio links, or even screen recordings of your Veo/Kling outputs. This is the most important part.

Tell me which AI video tools you use and which one you get the best results with

Bonus: Drop a link to any social media page or channel where you've posted AI-generated content





Applications without examples of AI video work will not be reviewed. I need to see what you can do — even rough outputs are fine, I just need proof you've actually done this before.



Looking forward to seeing your work

title: PERSONAL ASSISTANT (REMOTE – PART-TIME, PROACTIVE + NUMBERS-FOCUSED)
description:
We are looking for a highly proactive and detail-oriented Personal Assistant to support a busy homeschooling family and entrepreneur.



This is not a role where you wait for instructions.



We are looking for someone who takes initiative, thinks ahead, and actively looks for ways to make life easier.



The right person will regularly ask:



“Dom, how can I make your job easier today?”

—and then take action.



?



Key Responsibilities:



 • Track and manage monthly bills (due dates, amounts, confirmations)

 • Assist with bill pay and ensure nothing is missed

 • Maintain and update financial tracking spreadsheets

 • Provide clear monthly updates on spending and financial goals

 • Create and manage grocery shopping lists and assist with ordering (Instacart or similar)

 • Identify patterns or areas to improve organization and efficiency

 • Schedule appointments (haircuts, family needs, etc.)

 • Conduct light research when needed

 • Assist with simple Canva edits (homeschool materials, printables)

 • Keep tasks, reminders, and priorities organized



?



What We’re Looking For:



 • You are a self-starter who takes initiative without being told

 • You are comfortable with numbers, tracking, and spreadsheets

 • You notice things before being asked (missed bill, low groceries, upcoming task)

 • You are organized, reliable, and detail-oriented

 • You communicate clearly and consistently

 • You follow through and take ownership of your work

 • You are trustworthy with personal and financial information



?



Preferred (Not Required):



Experience with:

 • Canva

 • Google Sheets / Excel

 • Monarch Money (or similar budgeting tools)

 • Instacart (or grocery ordering platforms)

 • Asana (or task management tools)



?



This Role is NOT for You If:



 • You wait for instructions instead of taking action

 • You need constant supervision

 • You struggle with organization or deadlines



?



Schedule:



 • Part-time (5-10 hours per week)

 • Must have some overlap with EST but can do most tasks on your own time



Pay:

 • $4/hour

 • Paid twice monthly



?



To Apply:



Please include:



 1. A short written introduction

 2. Your experience with spreadsheets, bill tracking, or financial organization

 3. Your availability (in EST)

 4. A link to your resume

 5. A 1–2 minute video introduction answering the questions below



?



???? Video Introduction Questions:



 1. Tell me about yourself and your experience

 2. How do you stay organized when managing multiple tasks?

 3. How would you ensure bills and deadlines are never missed?

 4. What does being proactive mean to you?

 5. If you were working with me, how would you make my life easier?



?



Subject Line: Proactive Personal Assistant – [Your Name]



?



Important:

Start your application with:

“Jackie, here’s how I would make your life easier…”



(Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered.)

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
Video Editor & Personal Assistant – Personal Brand (TikTok & Instagram)



Niche: Day Trading | Personal Development | Miami Lifestyle

Format: Short-form video (2 minutes or under)

Hours: ~1 hour/day to start | Potential to grow into full-time

Pay: $100/month | Paid weekly or by preference | Significant growth potential tied to brand success



---



 Who You're Working With



My name is Dante. I'm 20 years old and I just moved to Miami, Florida. I trade stocks full time and I'm building a personal brand that I plan to grow into a real business — and more than that, a way to make genuine connections with like-minded people. My content covers day trading, personal development, and the lifestyle that comes with living in Miami and betting on yourself at a young age. I'm constantly working on becoming a better version of myself, and that energy runs through everything I create. I'm very easy to work with. I just ask for honest communication and reliable follow-through — that's it.



---



About the Role



I'm looking for a reliable, creative, and communicative video editor who can grow with this brand from the ground floor. This isn't just an editing job — I'm also looking for someone open to other online tasks like research, content ideas, and general assistance as the brand evolves. If you're someone who takes initiative, communicates well, and wants to be part of something that's genuinely being built, this could turn into something significant.



This starts as a part-time role (~1 hr/day), but the opportunity grows directly with the brand's success.



---



 What You'll Be Editing



Simpler edits:



- Cutting dead space and silences

- Making talking-head or lifestyle clips flow naturally and engagingly

- Adding captions, motion graphics, and on screen images where appropriate



Advanced edits (live trading videos):



- Receiving screen recordings of live trading sessions (multiple GBs of footage)

- Using provided timestamps to isolate specific trades within the recording

- Syncing a separate reaction recording with the trading footage

- Cutting and combining both into a clean, polished final video



---



 Editing Style



I want simple and clean. No cluttered editing, no flashy transitions, no overwhelming sounds or effects. The content should speak for itself. If you're someone who defaults to over-editing, this probably isn't the right fit. Less is more here.



---



 Requirements



- Fluent in English — strong reading, writing, and communication skills required

- Proficient in CapCut or any professional video editor (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, etc.)

- Powerful enough computer to import and scrub through several GBs of footage smoothly

- Familiar with day trading — basic understanding and genuine interest in the topic matters

- Quick communicator — responds promptly, sets realistic timelines, and follows through every time

- Open to variety — willing to help with other online tasks like research or general assistance when needed

- Inspired, not just hired — I want someone who actually connects with the content and brings their own ideas to the table



---



The Editing Vision



I'm not looking for someone to just execute instructions. I want someone who watches my content and thinks "here's how we could make this even better." Someone who will suggest improvements to how I film, how I structure videos, and how the overall brand looks and feels. The ideal workflow looks like this: I film, drop everything into a folder with directions, and you handle the rest with minimal input needed fro
. If you can get us to that point, this role grows with you.



---



On Pay & Growth



The starting rate is $100/month (~$3/hr) for approximately 1 hour of work per day. I'm fully transparent about that. What I can also tell you is that as this brand grows, the compensation has room for significant increases. I'm not looking to underpay someone who delivers real value — the starting rate reflects where we are right now, not where we're going. If you're the right person and the brand takes off, this becomes a full-time role with real earning potential. I'll always compensate fairly for extra work beyond the standard hours.



---



 How We'll Work Together



- I drop footage and directions into a shared folder

- You edit and deliver within the agreed timeline

- You flag ideas, suggestions, and improvements along the way

- We communicate quickly and clearly — no guessing games



I'm very easy to work with. My only non-negotiables are honest communication and reliable follow-through.



---



I know this application asks for a lot, and I want to be upfront about why. I'm not looking to fill a position — I'm looking for the right person. Someone I genuinely enjoy working with and can trust long term. My plan is to incorporate this person into my businesses as they grow, and if I bring on more virtual assistants down the road, I'd want you to be the one managing them. So whether it ends up being just the two of us or a larger operation, you would be my main point of contact and someone I rely on heavily. That's exactly why I need to be thorough now — so I don't have to go through this process again. If you're the right fit, this is the beginning of something much bigger than an editing job. I appreciate you taking the time and I'm genuinely excited to see who steps up.

— Dante





 To Apply



You will be given a test task before being hired. I want to see your work firsthand.



Watch the tutorial here — (
)

Access the editing materials here — (
)



Please submit the following:



- A short video about yourself — your hobbies, your interests, what you do with your free time, what motivates you, your dreams, your ideal job and pay, and what type of work you enjoy most



- A portfolio of short-form content you've edited (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, etc.)



- Your preferred editing software



- What you watch — What type of content do you watch on TikTok or Instagram? Do you watch YouTube? Who are your favorite creators on any platform? Be completely honest, I won't judge at all



- Your completed test edit from the materials linked above



- One or two suggestions on how you'd improve the content or the filming process based on what you've seen (the goal of this style of content is to be the Juliano Massarelli of daytrading see his content here: 
)



The person who shows the most initiative, creativity, and genuine interest will be selected. I'm excited to find the right person and build something great together.

title: Tax Accountant
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a highly motivated Tax Accountant with 3–5 years of professional experience in Australian accounting and taxation. The ideal candidate will be confident in managing a portfolio of clients in a cloud-based practice environment, delivering accurate and timely compliance, and providing strategic tax advice. This role requires someone who is both technically skilled and comfortable working in an online PHP-based job platform setup.

Key Responsibilities

Prepare and lodge individual, company, trust, and SMSF tax returns in compliance with ATO requirements.

Prepare BAS, IAS, and FBT returns accurately and on time.

Conduct tax planning and provide tailored advice to clients.

Manage client communication via online portals,
, and virtual meetings.

Collaborate with the team to improve cloud workflows and client experience.

Ensure compliance with Australian Accounting Standards and taxation legislation.

Assist in the preparation of financial statements and management reports.

Essential Skills & Experience

3–5 years’ experience in an Australian accounting/taxation role.

Solid understanding of Australian tax law, compliance, and reporting.

Experience in a cloud-based practice environment with the following software:

Xero (including Xero Practice Manager & Xero Tax)

MYOB (Essentials, AccountRight, AE/AR)

QuickBooks Online

Receipt Bank / Dext

Practice Ignition / Ignition

Hubdoc

Microsoft Office 365 & Google Workspace

Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.

Ability to work independently in an online/remote team environment.

Desirable Skills

Experience with cloud practice automation tools and workflow management.

Knowledge of corporate structures, SMSFs, and CGT.

Familiarity with PHP-based job platforms for client and workflow management.

Exposure to advisory services, including cashflow forecasting and business structuring.

Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Commerce, or related field.

CA or CPA qualified (or working towards).

Registered Tax Agent (desirable, but not essential).

Why Join Us?

Flexible work-from-anywhere arrangement.

Opportunity to work in a fully cloud-based practice.

Exposure to diverse clients and industries.

Supportive and collaborative online team culture.

title: Virtual Marketing & Technical Assistant – Mobile Car Detailing Company (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
Virtual Marketing & Technical Assistant – Mobile Car Detailing Company (Full-Time, Remote)



Company: Detail Me Please – A fast-growing mobile car detailing business in California, USA.

Position: Virtual Marketing & Technical Assistant

Type: Full-Time, Long-Term, Remote

Location: Work from home (Philippines)



About Us



Detail Me Please is a professional mobile car detailing company serving multiple counties across California. We bring premium detailing services directly to our customers’ homes and offices. As we grow, we’re looking for a skilled and motivated VA to take charge of our online presence, advertising, and digital marketing.



This is not a basic admin VA role — we are looking for someone technical, creative, and results-driven who can help us scale our business online.



Responsibilities



As our Virtual Marketing & Technical Assistant, you will:



Website Management & Improvements



Update and optimize our website (Go High Level experience preferred).



Ensure proper SEO structure, meta tags, sitemaps, and Google ranking improvements.



Create city/area-specific landing pages to boost local organic search.



Google Ads Management



Plan, launch, and optimize Google Ads campaigns for lead generation.



Monitor performance and adjust for best ROI.



Research and suggest new ad opportunities.



Social Media Management



Schedule and post regular content 
, Instagram, TikTok).



Create and edit short-form videos for ads and posts.



Respond to engagement where needed.



SEO & Online Presence



Improve organic search rankings through on-page and off-page SEO.



Research keywords, optimize content, and track analytics.



Suggest and implement strategies to dominate local search results.



Marketing & Growth Support



Research competitors and trends to improve campaigns.



Help design campaigns for promotions, seasonal offers, and discount codes.

title: Google LSA Specialist — Home Services Agency (Full-Time | $1,000/mo + Growth)
description:
We're a US-based marketing agency that works exclusively with contractors: HVAC, plumbing, asphalt, ect. We build their websites, run their local SEO, and manage their Google ads. Our clients are tradespeople who are great at their craft but need a team behind them to keep the phone ringing.

 

We're hiring our first dedicated LSA specialist to take full ownership of 15 active Local Service Ads accounts. This is a growth position, not a task list. You'll start at $1,000/month with performance-based raises & a clear path to $1,500+/mo as your portfolio grows and results follow.

 

 

THE ROLE

 

Once a client's LSA account is handed off to you, you own it. Not "manage" it, you own it. 

Their results are your results. (what's controllable of course) 

 

That looks like: optimizing profiles so they're fully built out with strong bios, photos, correct hours, and accurate service areas. Staying ahead of document expirations, insurance, licenses, background checks, so nothing lapses and kills a live campaign. Calling into local service ad support to trouble shoot. Rating leads with detailed notes so Google's algorithm learns what a good lead looks like. Listening to call recordings to make sure owners are actually picking up the phone. Tracking performance and bringing possible solutions when something's off.

 

You'll communicate directly with our strategist & sometimes our clients. These are contractors in the US, they don't speak marketing. You need to explain things clearly, record professional Loom video updates, and write messages that a busy business owner will act on.

 

You are NOT responsible for creating LSA accounts, running onboarding calls, or setting up billing. That happens before the account reaches you.

 

 

WHO YOU ARE

 

You've managed Local Service Ads before, not just Google Ads, actual LSA. You understand verification workflows, how lead credits work, and why hours matching GBP matters. You've dealt with insurance uploads, background check delays, and license requirements that vary by state and trade.

 

More importantly, you don't wait to be told something's wrong. You're the person who flags a declining lead quality trend on Monday, not the person who finds out about it in a Friday meeting. You track your own work, keep your own accounts tight, and take pride in the results you deliver.

 

Required:

- 2+ years managing GA's or LSA

- Strong written and spoken English (you'll talk to US clients directly)

- Comfortable recording Loom videos, clear, concise, professional

- Organized enough to run minimum 15 accounts without anything falling through the cracks 

- Proactive by default, you raise flags before they become fires

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional workspace

 

Bonus:

- Google Ads (Search, PMax) or Meta Ads experience

- Experience with home service businesses

- Familiarity with call tracking platforms

- Google Ads certification

 

 

THE DETAILS

 

$1,000/month USD starting salary with performance-based bonuses & salary increases with managed account volume. Full-time, flexible hours, but you need to be available during US business hours for client communication / internal strategy calls This is a long-term position. We're building an in home team! 

 

 

HOW TO APPLY

 

Start your application with the words "LSA Ready" so we know you actually read this.

 

Then answer these three things:

 

1. How many LSA accounts have you managed at once, and for what types of businesses?

2. Tell us about a time you caught a problem before it hit a client's campaign.

3. Record a Loom video introducing yourself & walking through of an LSA or CPC Campaign you're proud of.

 

No Loom, no interview. We need to hear how you communicate!

title: Backend engineer
description:
There are TWO openings for the Backend Software Engineer



Focus is on Python, FastAPI, building ETL Data pipelines, AWS and containerization

Also this one is a MUST HAVE: experience integrating LLM APIs (Azure OpenAI, OpenAI, Anthropic, Vertex AI, Bedrock) into applications, including prompt engineering, token management, and error handling

Nice to have: Kubernetes and Infrastructure-as-code familiarity (Terraform / Pulumi / CloudFormation) 

Backend Engineer



We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Backend Software Engineer with experience building cloud-native systems to join our team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in building production platforms, APIs, and services that enable internal teams to operate at scale. This role involves designing, building, and maintaining core backend infrastructure and service layers that power workflows across the organization. You will collaborate with data scientists, internal product teams, and other cross-functional stakeholders to understand their needs and deliver reliable, scalable services that accelerate business outcomes.



Qualifications:



Education: Bachelor's or Master's in Computer Science / Software Engineering / related field, or equivalent professional experience.



Experience: 6+ years of experience in software engineering, platform development, or a related field.

Technical Skills:



- Strong proficiency in Python with experience building production-grade services and libraries

- Experience designing and building RESTful APIs using modern Python frameworks (e.g., FastAPI, Starlette)

- Solid experience with relational databases, ORMs (e.g., SQLAlchemy), and schema migration management (e.g., Alembic)

- Experience building production data systems (ETL / data processing workflows)

- Cloud platform experience (AWS / GCP) including services like S3/GCS, Lambda/Cloud Functions, SQS/Pub-Sub, and managed databases

- Proficiency with containerization technologies (Docker)

- Practical experience developing CI/CD workflows — experience shipping code to production environments regularly

- Strong commitment to automated testing practices (unit, integration, and end-to-end testing)

- Strong software engineering fundamentals: version control, code review, testing, and documentation

- Soft Skills: Excellent problem-solving abilities, strong communication skills, and the ability to work effectively in a team environment. Ability to translate data science team needs into well-designed platform abstractions.



Additional Skills (Preferred):



- Kubernetes experience (EKS, GKE) - deploying, scaling, and troubleshooting containerized workloads

- Infrastructure-as-code familiarity (Terraform / Pulumi / CloudFormation)

- Experience integrating LLM APIs (Azure OpenAI, OpenAI, Anthropic, Vertex AI, Bedrock) into applications, including prompt engineering, token management, and error handling

- Experience with data manipulation and analysis using libraries such as pandas, NumPy, and SciPy



Job Responsibilities:



- API & Service Development: Design, build, and maintain scalable backend services and APIs that enable internal teams to integrate platform capabilities into their workflows.

- Database Design & Management: Design and manage database schemas, write performant queries, and oversee migration strategies to support evolving application requirements.

- Service Architecture: Architect and implement shared service layers - including API gateways, authentication, caching, and data access patterns - that the broader organization can leverage.

- Infrastructure & Reliability: Own cloud infrastructure, containerization, and deployment pipelines, ensuring high availability, observability, and cost efficiency.

- Developer Experience: Build well-documented SDKs, libraries, and tooling that make it easy for internal consumers to use platform services without deep infrastructure knowledge.

- Collaboration: Work closely with data scientists, product teams, and other engineers to understand their needs, gather requirements, and translate them into robust platform features.

- CI/CD & Testing: Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines, automated test suites, and monitoring to ensure reliable, repeatable deployments of services to production.

- Data Pipeline Support: Build and maintain ETL and data processing pipelines, ensuring data quality and integrity at scale.

title: Paid Traffic Operator
description:
Company Overview:

We're a US-based digital media agency experiencing rapid growth. We manage content and marketing campaigns for creators across various platforms. Our team works fully remote, spanning multiple time zones.



The Role:

We're hiring a Paid Traffic Operator to handle the hands-on execution of our paid advertising campaigns. This is an operational role—our internal traffic management system guides campaign decisions, and your responsibility is to execute workflows precisely, launch campaigns according to specifications, track performance, and report consistently.



You don't need to be a media buying strategist. You need to be dependable, process-oriented, and a clear communicator.



What You'll Do:

- Launch paid campaigns across multiple ad networks using detailed SOPs

- Check campaign performance daily through our internal dashboard

- Make manual adjustments in ad platforms—budgets, creatives, targeting—as instructed

- Flag performance issues that fall outside defined thresholds for management to review

- Deliver a brief daily async update covering spend, results, and any concerns

- Maintain accurate, current campaign data across all platforms



What We're Looking For:

- Meticulous attention to detail—you follow processes exactly, without shortcuts

- Dependable and consistent—daily reporting and punctuality are essential

- Basic experience with at least one ad platform (Meta Ads, Google Ads, or similar)

- Self-sufficient in a remote, async work environment

- Strong written English—clear, concise communication is central to this role

- Open to feedback—you ask questions early instead of guessing



Bonus Points:

- Experience with push, pop, or display traffic networks

- Background in a digital agency or media buying team

- Familiarity with CPM or CPC buying across multiple networks



How to Apply

Send your resume along with a short paragraph about the ad platform or traffic network you know best and what your responsibilities were. Applications missing this will not be considered.

title: Social Media Marketing VA
description:
Social Media Marketing VA (Full-Time, Remote)



Platforms: Instagram, X 
), TikTok, Pinterest, LinkedIn

Schedule: Monday–Friday | 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST (New York Time)



About the Role



We are hiring full-time Social Media Marketing VA to manage and grow client social media accounts across Instagram, X 
), TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn.



This is a hands-on execution role, not a content-only or automation-based position.



All growth is done manually, using real engagement, strategic targeting, and platform-safe best practices.

No bots. No automation tools. No shortcuts.



Each analyst manages approximately 10 client accounts and is responsible for executing daily growth activities, tracking performance, and maintaining full visibility through documentation and reporting.



If you are detail-oriented, disciplined, and enjoy structured social media growth work, this role is a strong long-term fit.



Important Notes (Please Read Carefully)



No bots, automation tools, or third-party growth apps

All actions are manual and follow strict internal SOPs

Daily documentation, screenshots, and reporting are mandatory

This is a full-time role only (not freelance or part-time)



What You’ll Do



As a Social Media Marketing VA, you will:



Execute manual organic growth across assigned platforms

Follows / unfollows

Likes and comments

Story interactions, profile visits, community engagement

Follow client-approved growth strategies and daily limits

Manage and update daily tracking spreadsheets

Monitor account health, activity, and potential restrictions

Submit weekly summaries and performance updates

Collaborate with Account Manager and Content teams when needed



Job Requirements



To be considered, you must:



Be available full-time only (Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST)

Have reliable high-speed internet

Be comfortable with daily Slack communication and Zoom meetings

Have a verified identity

Own both a computer and a mobile phone (required for account access)

Be willing to follow strict SOPs and documentation rules

Commit to long-term employment (not temporary work)



If you cannot work this schedule or follow structured processes, please do not apply.



Skills We’re Looking For



Strong written and spoken English

Familiarity with Instagram, X/Twitter, TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn

Strong attention to detail and consistency

Ability to follow instructions precisely

Comfortable with repetitive but strategic execution

Prior social media or growth experience is a plus.

Professional, reliable, and accountable



Compensation & Benefits



Fixed monthly salary (paid via PayPal)

Full training and onboarding provided

Opportunities for advancement within the company



About the Team



We are a fully remote team with members across different countries, including the Philippines.

Some team members have been with us for 6+ years, and we value long-term collaboration, consistency, and accountability.



How to Apply



If you are interested in this position and meet all the requirements above, please complete the application form below:







Qualified candidates will be invited to a Zoom video interview.



We are actively hiring and plan to onboard at least 3 analysts as soon as possible.



Apply only if you are serious about becoming a long-term, high-performing member of our team.

title: Associate Account Manager
description:
About Us

Cardinal Education is a premier educational services firm based in the San Francisco Bay Area that provides world-class academic coaching, test preparation, and admissions advising. The Connect Division, the team concerned with client operations, is central to our service delivery model, coordinating logistics, managing relationships, and ensuring that every family experiences the highest level of support and impact.



Role Overview

We are seeking a Client-Focused Associate Account Manager to own and manage ongoing relationships with families receiving our educational services. You will serve as the operational and relational hub for each client account, from onboarding through ongoing support, ensuring each family's experience is seamless, responsive, and high-value.



You’ll work closely with academic coaches, consultants, billing teams, and cross-functional leaders to deliver timely service, address concerns, and retain long-term clients.



Key Responsibilities

Serve as the primary point of contact for families after the initial onboarding, managing ongoing service delivery and communication.

Conduct regular client check-ins and provide timely, personalized support to maintain high levels of satisfaction and engagement.

Track client engagement and service quality, maintain accurate records, and recommend additional support to improve outcomes and retention.

Coordinate service launches and scheduling by aligning with internal teams, maintaining updated documentation, and addressing any issues to ensure a smooth client experience.

Work closely with Sales and Marketing to align messaging, share client insights, and support continuous improvements to the client experience.



Skills and Qualifications

Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience; background in education, customer success, or client services is a strong plus.

At least 1-3 years of experience in account management, client services, or operations.

Exceptional written and verbal communication skills.

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

Comfort working across multiple platforms (e.g., Google Workspace, Trello, CRM/billing systems).

Ability to multitask and manage multiple client relationships in a fast-paced environment.

Empathetic, service-oriented mindset with a bias toward action and follow-through.



Benefits

Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses

Ongoing compensation reviews and merit-based increases

Fully remote work environment with structured team support

Collaborative, high-performing team culture with cross-functional exposure

Hands-on mentorship and career development opportunities

Mission-driven work that directly impacts students and families

Company events and virtual team-building activities

Opportunities to grow within client operations, education services, and beyond

title: Client Support Specialist
description:
Woflow is the leading merchant experience platform that empowers technology platforms to onboard and manage their merchant data. By deploying AI and human-in-the-loop processes, we extract, enhance, and connect catalog and image data. To date, our platform has supported millions of businesses – from SMBs to enterprise retailers – in succeeding on platforms like Uber, Walmart, Square, DoorDash, Toast, Lightspeed, and many others.



We are looking for a Client Support Specialist who can bring expertise and dedication to supporting our clients and ensuring a seamless onboarding process onto our platform.



Role Overview:

As a Client Support Specialist, you will be responsible for onboarding merchants to our tech platform and providing ongoing support to American clients. You’ll play a vital role in ensuring client satisfaction by assisting with technical issues and fostering a positive user experience.



This role requires someone who can operate effectively under pressure, manage urgent timelines, and confidently handle escalations while maintaining a high level of professionalism and empathy.

You should be highly organized, with strong project management skills, and capable of balancing multiple client needs without compromising quality or responsiveness.



Key Responsibilities:

- Support merchants through a full end-to-end platform onboarding process, guiding them in adapting to our tool and troubleshooting any issues.

- Engage with clients via
 and phone, ensuring all interactions are handled with professionalism and clarity.

- Respond to and resolve technical inquiries in a timely and efficient manner.

- Maintain accurate records of interactions and follow up to ensure client satisfaction.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to escalate and resolve complex issues.

- Own and manage urgent client requests and escalations, ensuring timely resolution while keeping stakeholders informed.

- Prioritize and manage multiple workflows simultaneously, ensuring deadlines and service-level expectations are consistently met.

- Exercise strong judgment in client communication, especially during escalations, by acknowledging issues, demonstrating accountability, and avoiding overly scripted or tone-deaf responses.





Requirements:

- Experience: At least 5 years of experience in client success or account management, with a proven track record of overseeing client accounts and effectively managing interactions across multiple communication channels (chat,
, and calls). Prior experience in a senior, lead, or managerial capacity is highly preferred.

- B2B Technical Solutions: Proven experience in providing B2B technical solutions, including resolving complex technical issues, assisting with system integrations, and delivering tailored product implementations, while maintaining strong client relationships and ensuring adherence to service-level agreements (SLAs). 

- Client Engagement: Demonstrated expertise in supporting U.S. clients, prioritizing exceptional customer satisfaction.

- Language: Fluent in English, with strong written and verbal communication skills. You can break down and articulate complex ideas in simple, understandable ways.

- Organization: Highly organized with strong attention to detail. Have a great approach to high-level accuracy within a deadline-driven environment.

- Organization & Project Management: Highly organized with strong project management skills, capable of managing competing priorities, tracking progress across multiple clients, and delivering within tight deadlines.

- Escalation Management: Proven ability to handle high-pressure situations, urgent timelines, and client escalations with professionalism, accountability, and sound judgment.

- Communication Judgment: Demonstrated ability to communicate thoughtfully during sensitive situations, ensuring responses are empathetic, context-aware, and not overly reliant on templates or scripts.

 - Adaptability: Comfortable working in a dynamic startup environment and taking ownership of client issues. You are highly proactive, curious, driven, and self-sufficient.



Benefits:

- Fully remote full-time job - work from anywhere in the world!

- Competitive salary

- Initial training and continued team support provided.

- Grow with us as we grow!

title: Grant Writer
description:
Who We Are



Feathers Project is a non-profit dedicated to finding the poorest of the poor in the Philippines, those who have fallen through the cracks—people living in dire conditions without any other form of assistance. Our mission is to ensure “100% direct charity”. We do this with a small team that goes into the most poverty darkened communities in search of those in the greatest need of charity, and we provide the sponsors’ donations to  them—directly.



Feathers Project  is mostly funded by partner companies whose employees become volunteers to ensure integrity in the process. We emphasize disciplined processes, transparency, and audits to ensure that we do not wander from the mission.



What You’ll Do – Position Summary:

The Grant Writer will play a key role in securing funding to support Feathers Project’s mission of delivering “100% direct charity” to underserved communities in the Philippines. As a Grant Writer, you will directly contribute to expanding Feathers Project’s  reach and strengthening its programs by securing funding from local and international donors. Your work will enable the organization to scale its initiatives, improve community outcomes, and build long-term impact.



Responsibilities:

Research and identify grant opportunities from Philippine government agencies (e.g., DOH, DSWD), local foundations, NGOs, and international funding bodies

Develop and write high-quality grant proposals, including narratives, budgets, and supporting documents

Create and manage a grant calendar to track deadlines, submissions, and reporting requirements

Collaborate with internal teams to gather program data, impact stories, and operational details

Maintain accurate records of grant applications, funding status, and compliance requirements

Build and maintain relationships with funders, partners, and stakeholders

Prepare grant reports and impact updates for donors

Ensure all submissions align with Hey Dan’s mission, programs, and strategic priorities

Stay updated on funding trends in the Philippines, particularly in nonprofit, community development, and digital initiatives

Support monitoring and evaluation efforts to strengthen funding proposals

Assist in developing fundraising materials (decks, concept notes, donor briefs)

Goal: To generate an average of 250,000 php in grant funding per month





Skills & Experience:

At least 3–5 years of successful experience in grant writing, fundraising, or nonprofit development

title: Google Ads Manager
description:
We are two New Zealand video production businesses looking for a skilled and reliable Google Ads Manager to help us generate more leads online.



The two businesses are:

- Pilot Films (
) – Corporate video production and photography studio

- YellowFire Wedding Films (
) – Wedding videography 



This is an ongoing part-time role, approximately 5–10 hours per month.





RESPONSIBILITIES



- Set up and manage Google Ads campaigns for both websites

- Research and target the right keywords for NZ audiences

- Write ad copy that suits each brand

- Set up conversion tracking so we can see which ads generate enquiries

- Monitor and optimise campaigns monthly to reduce wasted spend

- Send a simple monthly report showing results and what was done





REQUIREMENTS



- At least 2 years of Google Ads experience

- Experience with service-based businesses and lead generation (not online stores)

- Google Ads certification is a plus

- Familiar with Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and Google Tag Manager

- Good written English

- Honest, reliable and easy to communicate with

- Experience working with Australian or New Zealand clients is a bonus





HOW TO APPLY



Please send us:

1. A short intro about yourself and your Google Ads experience

2. One or two examples of campaigns you have managed and the results you achieved

3. Your monthly rate for managing two accounts



We are not looking for the cheapest option — we want someone who takes pride in their work and genuinely wants to help our businesses grow.

title: Sales Support Specialist
description:
We are seeking a Sales Support Specialist in the IT services and solutions industry. This is a blended role combining business development and sales support, ideal for a proactive professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment. The role involves prospecting, managing client relationships, supporting the full sales cycle, and leveraging AI tools to enhance efficiency and lead generation.



Job Responsibilities:

-Prospect and identify new accounts; build and manage call lists within CRM platforms.

-Execute call and
 campaigns; schedule meetings and presentations with potential clients.

-Manage and nurture 200–250 active accounts/leads, maintaining consistent follow-up cadences.

-Engage with C-level executives and IT leaders to discuss business objectives and solutions.

-Develop and implement sales strategies to drive revenue growth and acquire new clients.

-Support the full sales process, including creating sales orders, consolidating notes, and assisting procurement.

-Maintain accurate sales forecasts and pipeline reporting.

-Utilize AI tools to generate leads, create content, and automate workflows.

-Prepare presentations, respond to RFPs, and support client meetings.

-Assist in managing existing accounts and identifying cross-selling opportunities.

-Generate weekly, monthly, and quarterly performance reports.

-Collaborate with internal teams to support technical discussions and client needs.

-Continuously learn and adapt to evolving products, services, and industry trends.



Qualifications:

-Bachelor’s degree in a related field or equivalent experience.

-Minimum of 5 years of sales or business development experience.

-Experience using AI platforms to support sales functions.

-Strong understanding of sales processes and client relationship management.

-Familiarity with Salesforce (or similar CRM tools) is expected or highly preferred

-Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills.

-Ability to manage multiple projects and prioritize effectively.

-Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to engage stakeholders at all levels.

-Proficiency in Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.



Requirements:

-Updated Resume/CV.

-Reliable internet connection and modern computer setup 

-Ability to work in a dynamic, evolving environment.

-Strong commitment to data privacy, security policies, and operational standards.



Benefits:

-Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

-HMO for you and your dependents

-Paid time off and holidays.

-Training and development opportunities.



Join our team now and be part of the top 1% talent in the Philippines!

title: Part-Time Finance Manager / Controller (U.S. Multi-Entity Accounting – QuickBooks Desktop)
description:
About the Role



I own multiple U.S.-based businesses (insurance agency, vehicle registration company, and a real estate portfolio including STR/MTR/LTR properties). I’m looking for a high-level Finance Manager / Controller, not just a bookkeeper.



This role requires someone who can take full ownership of multi-entity financial systems, trust accounting, reconciliations, accurate reporting, and monthly coordination with my CPA.



You will begin as part-time (12 hours/week) with the intention to expand into full-time as we build trust, rapport, and clear financial systems.



Responsibilities

Insurance Agency Accounting (QuickBooks Desktop)



Manage trust account for insurance premiums



Track premium deposits, carrier payments, commissions, & broker fees



Move commissions from trust to operating monthly



Reconcile multiple bank & credit card accounts



Monthly P&L, balance sheet & budget-to-actual reporting



Ensure compliance & accuracy in financial workflows



CVP (Vehicle Registration Business)



Maintain DMV trust account



Reconcile incoming payments vs DMV/wire fees



Transfer agency fees to operating account



Produce monthly reports



Real Estate Portfolio Accounting



Track revenue from STR, MTR, and LTR properties



Categorize repairs vs capital improvements



Assist with depreciation schedules (working with CPA)



Track rent roll, tenant invoices, and reimbursements



Create property-level and consolidated reporting



Personal Finance



Categorize personal spending (multiple accounts & credit cards)



Track personal expenses run through the business



Build an accurate picture of net income & cash flow



Assist with budgeting and forecasting



General Responsibilities



Month-end close across all entities



Prepare monthly consolidated financial reporting



Maintain audit-ready books



Meet monthly with my CPA to verify accuracy of work (at the start)



Build systems, SOPs, and financial controls



Required Skills & Qualifications

Must-Have



5+ years accounting experience



QuickBooks Desktop expert



Experience with U.S. multi-entity accounting



Experience with real estate accounting (STR/MTR/LTR preferred)



Experience with trust accounts (insurance, escrow, legal, or real estate trust)



Strong understanding of repairs vs capital improvements, depreciation, and property reporting



Payroll experience (Paychex preferred)



High-level English written communication



Strong analytical and reporting skills



Ability to work 8 AM – 11 AM Pacific Time (non-negotiable)



Bonus Skills



Insurance agency accounting



DMV or service-based bookkeeping



Experience building budgets & financial forecasts



Experience with SOP creation & system setup



To Apply



Please include the following (incomplete submissions will not be considered):



1. A short intro video (2–3 minutes) answering:



Tell me about your U.S. accounting experience



Your experience with QuickBooks Desktop



Your experience with trust accounting



Are you comfortable working 8 AM – 11 AM Pacific Time daily?



2. Send your résumé + LinkedIn profile

3. Answer these three screening questions:



(a) Describe your experience with reconciling a trust account and moving funds to an operating account.

(b) Explain the difference between a repair and a capital improvement for rental property accounting.

(c) How would you structure a multi-entity bookkeeping system in QuickBooks Desktop?

title: Senior Accountant, Management Accounting and Business Services
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



In this role as Senior Accountant of the Accounting and Finance Services team in Manila, you will be responsible for supporting your managers by ensuring that high-quality financial accounting, business advisory, and business management services are provided to our institutional and corporate clients. Your expertise will be integral in driving the success of the team and delivering tailored, specialized outcomes for our clients. You will be required to complete key management accounting and business services tasks in a timely manner, working with your broader team to accomplish an excellent standard of service delivery for our clients.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Management Accounting:

-Perform key management accounting tasks, including cost analysis, margin analysis, and performance metrics.

-Develop and maintain management accounting reports to assist in decision-making.

-Support clients in understanding their financial performance and identifying areas for improvement.

- Undertake Accounts Payable / Receivable processes (inputting invoices, processing bills, etc.)

- Process and maintain payroll functionality

- Attend to 
 and process inbound requests accordingly.



Financial Reporting and Analysis:

-Prepare, review, and analyze monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.

-Provide insights and recommendations based on financial analysis to suit desired stakeholder requirements.

-Ensure compliance with accounting standards and regulatory requirements.



Budgeting and Forecasting:

-Participate in the budgeting and forecasting process for clients, including variance analysis and reporting.

-Collaborate with clients and internal stakeholders to develop realistic and achievable plans.

-Monitor budget implementation and provide ongoing financial projections and analysis.



Business Advisory:

-Support strategic business advisory services to clients, helping them make informed financial decisions.

-Identify opportunities for business growth and cost savings, and provide actionable recommendations.

-Conduct financial modeling and scenario analysis to support business strategies.



Client Relationship Management:

-Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, ensuring high levels of client satisfaction.

-Act as a primary point of contact for clients, addressing their accounting and business service needs.

-Provide regular updates and reports to clients on their financial status and business performance.



Compliance and Risk Management:

-Ensure all financial practices adhere to legal regulations and company policies.

-Identify and mitigate financial risks through diligent monitoring and control processes.

-Support internal and external audits by providing required documentation and explanations.



EXPERIENCE AND QUALIFICATIONS:



To be successful in this role, the ideal candidate will have the following experience and

qualifications:

- Software Experience: By familiar with ERP systems like Netsuite, Salesforce etc. while having a strong competence in XERO and/or MYOB

- Educational Background: A bachelor's degree in accounting, finance, or a related field

- Relevant Experience: A minimum of 3 years post-graduate experience within the financial management or accounting industry

- Regulatory Knowledge: Strong understanding of relevant accounting standards, tax laws, and regulatory requirements.

- Communication Skills: Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

- Problem-Solving Skills: Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities

- Technical Skills: Proficiency in Microsoft Office and financial management software

- Professional Certification: Professional accounting or finance qualification (e.g. CA, CPA, CFA) is highly desirable.

- Client Management Skills: Strong relationships building and maintenance with clients.

)

title: Remote Outbound Sales Representative
description:
About Haulla

Haulla, a smart waste collection service by Ecube Labs, operates in major U.S. markets including Dallas, Houston, Austin, Denver, and Chicago — with plans for further expansion across North America. We help small and mid-sized businesses across the U.S. find better, more affordable waste solutions.

title: Data & Reporting Assistant  - CrucialPoint Agency | Remote | Part-Time
description:
About CrucialPoint

CrucialPoint Agency is a precision retention marketing agency trusted by 7-, 8-, and 9-figure D2C brands. We specialize in
, SMS, and lifecycle marketing. Our team is lean, fast-moving, and obsessed with accuracy.



The Role

We are looking for a Data & Reporting Assistant to serve as the backbone of our performance tracking. You will be responsible for pulling, organizing, and maintaining the data that allows our strategists to make multi-million dollar decisions.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Data Extraction: Pulling reports from Klaviyo, Shopify, and Google Analytics.

- Data Management: Transferring raw data into Google Sheets and Notion dashboards.

- Quality Control: Auditing reports to ensure numbers match across different systems.

- Reporting Cycles: Updating daily and weekly reports with 100?curacy.



Requirements

- Extreme Attention to Detail: You catch small errors that others miss.

- Spreadsheet Fluency: High comfort level with Google Sheets (formatting, basic formulas).

- Reliability: Available for at least 4 hours of overlap with US Mountain Time (MST).

- Process-Oriented: You enjoy following a checklist and ensuring data is "clean."



Compensation & Growth

- Rate: $6–$10/hour (depending on experience).

- Path: Starts part-time with a clear path to full-time based on performance.



How to Apply (The Precision Test)

To be considered for this role, please submit your application along with the answer to the following Data Accuracy Challenge.



The Challenge:

Compare the two data entries below. There are 3 specific discrepancies (errors) in the "Manual Entry" when compared to the "Raw Data."

Raw Data (Source): Order_ID: #9921 | Date: 10/12/26 | Subtotal: $142.50 | Tax: $11.40 | Total: $153.90 | Attribute:
_Klaviyo

Manual Entry (Sheet): ID: #9912 | Date: 10/12/26 | Subtotal: $142.05 | Total: $153.90 | Source: Klaviyo



Please provide your application with:

A list of the 3 errors you found in the Manual Entry.

A brief 1-sentence explanation of why a marketing platform (like Klaviyo) and a store platform (like Shopify) might show different "Total Revenue" for the same time period.

title: Virtual Assistant (Google Business Profile & Local SEO Specialist)
description:
Virtual Assistant (Google Business Profile & Local SEO Specialist)

About the Role



We are looking for a highly organized, process-driven Virtual Assistant with proven hands-on experience in Google Business Profile (GBP) optimization and local lead generation.



This is not a task-based role. We need someone who thinks in systems, builds efficient workflows, tracks performance metrics, and takes ownership of results.



This is a long-term, remote growth position with the opportunity to take on more responsibility, including leadership and process development.



Key Responsibilities

Google Business Profile Optimization

Optimize and manage Google Business Profiles for maximum local visibility

Implement structured local SEO strategies to improve rankings

Perform competitor analysis and identify ranking opportunities

Increase profile performance (calls, clicks, engagement, conversions)

Lead Generation & Systems

Build and maintain organized local business lead databases

Support the setup and execution of outreach systems

Identify inefficiencies and recommend scalable workflow improvements

Track KPIs and deliver structured weekly performance reports

Process & Administrative Support

Develop, document, and refine SOPs for recurring tasks

Maintain CRM systems and ensure accurate data tracking

Conduct research to support operational efficiency

Ensure clean, consistent data and streamlined workflows

Who We’re Looking For



You are someone who:



Has direct, hands-on experience with Google Business Profile optimization

Understands local SEO beyond basic tactics

Thinks in systems and enjoys building organized processes

Is detail-oriented, proactive, and solution-focused

Can work independently with minimal supervision

Communicates clearly and professionally in written English

Can balance growth initiatives with operational execution

Performance Expectations

Clear documentation of all recurring processes

Consistent weekly KPI and performance reporting

Ongoing optimization and testing mindset

Proactive identification of improvements and inefficiencies

Tools & Software



Experience with the following tools is highly preferred:



SEMrush

BrightLocal

Ahrefs

Nice-to-Have (Bonus)

French language skills

Leadership mindset with the ability to:

Implement processes

Solve problems independently

Help structure and guide a growing team



Benefits:**

Fully remote:

Based on Experience X 40 hours per week (salary every Friday)

Opportunities for professional development and growth.

Dynamic and supportive work environment.

Monday to Friday, 9AM - 5PM EST

Job Security and Stability

PTO

Inclusive Culture

Upskilling Opportunities

100% Work-From-Home

Exceptionally Supportive Team

Opportunities for Career Growth

Technical Requirements:

USB Headset with Noise Cancellation feature

Working Webcam

Computer with at least 1.8 GHz processor and at least 4GB RAM

Main Internet Service Speed: at least 25 Mbps cable connection

Backup Internet Service Speed: at least 10 Mbps

Young Publisher -

s and basic administrative tasks

title: Video Editor – Long-Form Cinematic Adventure
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled YouTube video editor to transform raw footage into immersive, cinematic experiences. This role isn't about fast-paced "retention editing"; it’s about building an atmosphere, mastering sound design, and letting the environment tell the story.



This channel is dedicated to sharing outdoor adventures through a lens of tranquility and awe. We believe that the most powerful stories aren't told through frantic cuts or loud personalities, but through the landscape itself. Our mission is to transport the viewer to the world’s most remote and beautiful destinations, providing a digital sanctuary that emphasizes the scale, silence, and serenity of the natural world.

We are looking for a dedicated Video Editor who can transform raw field footage into polished, immersive long-form experiences. This is a role for a storyteller who enjoys the "slow cinema" process—someone who can find the narrative thread in hours of wilderness footage and weave it into a cohesive journey.



Your day-to-day will involve:

 • Narrative Curation: Reviewing 2–3 hours of raw footage to select the most impactful clips that build a 20–60 minute story.

 • Color Grading: Bringing LOG footage to life with a "true-to-life" aesthetic—natural, vibrant, and sharp.

 • Atmospheric Audio: Crafting a seamless audio flow where the environment speaks as loudly as the visuals.

 • Musical Curation: Selecting tracks from our licensed library that complement, rather than overpower, the scene.

We operate under a "Place over Personality" philosophy. Your editing style should be cinematic and invisible—the viewer should not feel it’s over edited.

 • Pacing: Slow and immersive. We want shots to breathe, giving the viewer time to register the emotion of a location.

 • Subject Integration: We use people primarily for scale and perspective. We favor motion transitions (e.g., a subject walking through the frame) to move between scenes naturally.

 • The Invisible Observer: The camera is a witness, never an intrusion. Your edits should maintain this sense of being a quiet observer of the journey.

TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

 • Software Proficiency: Expert-level command of DaVinci Resolve or Final Cut Pro.

 • Workflow: Experience managing a 4K 10-bit workflow and large file transfers.

 • Color Mastery: Proven ability to grade LOG footage to a professional, natural finish.

 • Sound Design: You must be skilled at working primarily with natural ambient sounds recorded in the field. While we provide a music library, the "music" of the wind, footsteps, and water is the priority.

 • Attention to Detail: A high standard for technical polish, from frame-accurate cuts to clean audio transitions.

 • Infrastructure: A reliable, high-speed internet connection for consistent file synchronization.

HOW TO APPLY To ensure we are a good creative match, please follow these steps carefully:

 1 Review the Benchmark: Watch this video to understand our required look, feel, and pacing. If you can meet or exceed this quality, we want to see your work.

 2 Portfolio: Provide a link to your portfolio, specifically highlighting cinematic or outdoor adventure work. Applications without a portfolio link will not be reviewed.

 3 Software Experience: Tell us about your journey with DaVinci Resolve or Final Cut Pro. How many years have you used them? What are your strengths, and what areas are you currently developing?

 4 Technical Specs: Please include your current internet upload/download speeds.

 5 Submission: Send your application to our hiring
. Note: Your subject line must include the word “mabusisi” to be considered.

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a paid test edit to demonstrate their grasp of our specific pacing and color requirements. We look forward to seeing your vision.

title: Facebook Marketplace Sourcing & Messaging Assistant (Commission-Based)
